_schema.description: Source of truth for ServiceNow documentation links surfaced in the AMEX instance architecture diagram. Each entry may declare 'aliases' — a list of diagram element IDs that should reuse the same content.

entry_shape.name: Display name
entry_shape.eyebrow: Section label shown above the title

ew-hrsd.name: HR Service Delivery
ew-hrsd.tagline: Streamline HR workflows, boost productivity, and improve employee satisfaction with AI agents across the full employee lifecycle.
ew-hrsd.summary: HR Service Delivery reduces repetitive tasks and improves employee productivity by leveraging AI agents that handle requests and automate workflows from hiring to exit. The platform frees HR teams to focus on strategic, human-centered work while employees gain instant access to answers and services through an AI-powered front door.

feature_cards.title: AI Front Door
feature_cards.description: Give employees a next-gen AI experience to get answers and take action instantly — no tickets, no waiting.

feature_cards.title: Agentic Self-Service
feature_cards.description: One place to search, ask, speak, or type. AI handles repetitive tasks so your team focuses on meaningful work.

feature_cards.title: Manager Productivity
feature_cards.description: Managers get a single place to run tasks, team approvals, and growth conversations with help from AI agents.

feature_cards.title: HR Agent Productivity
feature_cards.description: HR teams resolve cases fast, with AI agents handling routine requests and escalating only the complex ones.

key_capabilities: AI agents automate requests across employee lifecycle
One unified portal replacing multiple HR channels

ew-wsd.name: Workplace Service Delivery
ew-wsd.tagline: Automate and simplify workplace tasks for a smooth-running, connected employee experience.
ew-wsd.summary: Workplace Service Delivery unifies workplace data and processes across disconnected systems. It brings employee engagement and facilities workflows together on a single platform, offering integrated insights and automated actions powered by AI to support business growth.

feature_cards.title: Space Planning
feature_cards.description: Right-size your space with AI insights. Optimize your real estate portfolio with proactive trend and usage data.

feature_cards.title: Operational Efficiency
feature_cards.description: Streamline workplace service requests and maintenance. Automate tasks via schedules, sensors, and asset conditions.

feature_cards.title: Reservations & Scheduling
feature_cards.description: Reduce booking friction with AI-driven insights. Improve office resource utilization and employee experience.

feature_cards.title: Health & Safety Management
feature_cards.description: Minimize avoidable risk with simplified assessment and monitoring. Employees report concerns easily; hazards stay visible.

key_capabilities: Mobile access for hybrid and remote workers

ew-fsm.name: Field Service Management
ew-fsm.tagline: Turn repeat visits into first-time fixes with FSM.
ew-fsm.summary: ServiceNow Field Service Management uses AI to assign jobs with precision, empower technicians, and streamline field operations. It moves field service from reactive to proactive by predicting issues early and automating scheduling. AI agents, data, and workflows run on one enterprise-grade platform built for scale and trust.

stats.label: productivity improvement in Field Service Management
customer calls saved with AI-powered Virtual Repair
pieces of equipment maintained and deployed

feature_cards.title: Smart Work Planning
feature_cards.description: Manage resources in a single flexible workspace with AI-balanced workloads across technicians, crews, and contractors.

feature_cards.title: Autonomous Scheduling
feature_cards.description: Let AI coordinate assignments and keep schedules optimized as priorities, skills, and availability shift in real time.

feature_cards.title: Mobile Work Execution
feature_cards.description: Give technicians an AI copilot that predicts next steps, surfaces asset history, and guides field tasks on any device.

feature_cards.title: Performance Optimization
feature_cards.description: Monitor asset trends and analyze utilization to drive continuous improvement and prevent future service disruptions.

key_capabilities: Assign work to the best-fit technician, crew, or contractor automatically
Predict issues early and trigger preventive maintenance plans
Transform technicians into experts with mobile AI guidance
Break down silos through automated cross-team workflows
Improve first-time fix rates with asset data and service history
Reduce service disruptions with predictable, optimized schedules

ew-sop.name: Source-to-Pay Operations
ew-sop.tagline: Automate procurement workflows end-to-end with AI.
ew-sop.summary: Source-to-Pay Operations reduces manual work across sourcing and purchasing processes, freeing teams to focus on strategic priorities like price negotiation and cost optimization through AI-powered automation.

feature_cards.title: Source-to-Contract
feature_cards.description: AI agents gather requirements and surface savings opportunities while accelerating vendor onboarding without manual intervention.

feature_cards.title: Procure-to-Pay
feature_cards.description: Streamline purchasing with guided workflows, intelligent approvals, and automated invoice processing at scale.

feature_cards.title: Supplier Relationship Management
feature_cards.description: Reduce manual work in vendor onboarding, management, and offboarding while tracking performance metrics centrally.

feature_cards.title: Autonomous Orchestration
feature_cards.description: End-to-end process automation across teams and systems — before, between, and after transactions.

key_capabilities: AI agent-driven task automation across procurement
Guided buying with clear approval workflows

ew-tprm.name: Third-Party Risk Management
ew-tprm.tagline: Take control of the third-party risk lifecycle, from onboarding to retirement.
ew-tprm.summary: Third-Party Risk Management helps organizations continuously monitor critical vendors to evaluate, mitigate, and remediate risks. Centralize vendor management in one location and transform assessment processes with automation and intelligence.

feature_cards.title: Onboarding, Offboarding & Renewals
feature_cards.description: Perform due diligence and assessments at all relationship stages with automated built-in processes.

feature_cards.title: Risk Intelligence & Monitoring
feature_cards.description: Integrate targeted risk intelligence scores and ratings for continuous insights across your vendor ecosystem.

feature_cards.title: Third-Party Portal
feature_cards.description: Connect and collaborate with third parties in a single location for all risk management activities.

feature_cards.title: Portfolio Management
feature_cards.description: Eliminate spreadsheets with a centralized database for third-party information and concentration risk mapping.

er-irm.name: Integrated Risk Management
er-irm.tagline: Make risk-informed decisions and increase efficiency with real-time intelligence and automated workflows.
er-irm.summary: Integrated Risk Management operationalizes risk and resilience across your enterprise on a single platform. Continuously monitor risks and controls while automating compliance workflows, enabling organizations to manage governance, risk, and compliance strategies with confidence and efficiency.

feature_cards.title: Policy & Compliance Management
feature_cards.description: Automate and manage policy lifecycles while continuously monitoring for compliance across your organization.

feature_cards.title: Risk Management
feature_cards.description: Enable fine-grained business impact analysis to prioritize and respond to identified risks.

feature_cards.title: Operational Resilience Management
feature_cards.description: Gain real-time visibility into the resilience of your technology, people, processes, and facilities.

feature_cards.title: Audit Management
feature_cards.description: Use risk data to scope and prioritize audit plans while automating cross-functional processes.

key_capabilities: Continuous monitoring and regulatory change insights
AI-powered workflow automation and no-code playbooks
Unified single data model eliminating silos
Risk quantification with FAIR analysis integration

er-bcm.name: Business Continuity Management
er-bcm.tagline: Plan, exercise, and recover from disasters effectively with enterprise automation.
er-bcm.summary: Business Continuity Management enables organizations to harmonize business continuity, disaster recovery, and crisis management through real-time integration with the ServiceNow CMDB. Build automated workflows and implement recovery strategies for any disruption.

feature_cards.title: Business Impact Analysis
feature_cards.description: Find and prioritize business services to produce recovery time and point objectives (RTO and RPO).

feature_cards.title: Exercise Management
feature_cards.description: Practice recovery plans during normal operations to assess preparedness and identify planning gaps.

feature_cards.title: Crisis Management
feature_cards.description: Activate continuity plans and monitor ongoing completion of recovery tasks during a crisis event in real time.

feature_cards.title: Emergency Mass Notifications
feature_cards.description: Send emergency communications quickly through 25+ channels including email, text, and phone.

er-privacy.name: Privacy Management
er-privacy.tagline: Turn privacy complexity into operational control on a single unified platform.
er-privacy.summary: Privacy Management unifies privacy risk, compliance, and operations to help organizations meet regulatory deadlines, stay audit-ready, and build customer trust. AI accelerates assessments and ongoing compliance activities while providing real-time visibility into privacy risks across the enterprise.

feature_cards.title: Compliance Management
feature_cards.description: Map obligations across jurisdictions, monitor regulatory changes, and generate compliance evidence instantly.

feature_cards.title: Privacy Operations
feature_cards.description: Automate assessments, maintain records of processing activities, and embed privacy controls across the enterprise.

feature_cards.title: Risk Management
feature_cards.description: Identify, prioritize, and remediate privacy risks with automated workflows and continuous monitoring.

feature_cards.title: Data Subject Rights
feature_cards.description: Automate DSAR fulfillment and meet regulatory deadlines without increasing operational overhead.

key_capabilities: Real-time privacy risk visibility and monitoring

is-itsm.name: IT Service Management
is-itsm.tagline: Align IT service management with ITIL standards to manage access, availability, and fulfill service requests at scale.
is-itsm.summary: ServiceNow ITSM intelligently delivers resilient enterprise IT services on a unified AI platform. It combines people, processes, and workflows to boost IT productivity and create exceptional employee experiences through automation and real-time insights.

stats.label: saved per request with Now Assist

feature_cards.title: Resilient IT Services
feature_cards.description: Keep IT services responsive and scalable using AI agents and performance analytics to autonomously complete tasks.

feature_cards.title: Staff Productivity
feature_cards.description: Unify people, data, and workflows with automated incident routing and intelligent AI recommendations.

feature_cards.title: 24/7 Employee Support
feature_cards.description: Round-the-clock IT support via a mobile-friendly portal and AI Voice Agent, with AI search and assistive capabilities.

feature_cards.title: Single-Platform Transformation
feature_cards.description: Unite AI agents, data, and workflows on one enterprise-grade platform built for scale and trust.

is-itam.name: IT Asset Management
is-itam.tagline: Automate the end-to-end lifecycle for software, hardware, and cloud assets to optimize costs while reducing risk.
is-itam.summary: IT Asset Management runs on the ServiceNow AI Platform to automate the full asset lifecycle. AI Agents automate tasks from planning to end-of-life to improve data accuracy across contracts, costs, and compliance. ITAM connects to catalogs, CMDB, and procurement for real-time visibility.

feature_cards.title: Lifecycle Management
feature_cards.description: Automate tracking, usage, and retirement of IT assets. Maximize value, reduce risk, and maintain compliance.

feature_cards.title: Audit Readiness
feature_cards.description: Maintain comprehensive, accurate asset and license records. Respond quickly and demonstrate compliance.

feature_cards.title: Cloud FinOps
feature_cards.description: Automate cloud cost tracking and forecasting. Use real-time insights for smarter multicloud decisions.

feature_cards.title: Inventory Management
feature_cards.description: Improve inventory accuracy and reduce loss. Track, receive, and manage assets with AI agents.

key_capabilities: Real-time visibility across all IT assets
Automated lifecycle workflows and AI agents

is-itom.name: IT Operations Management
is-itom.tagline: Stop chasing outages and incidents with AIOps that provides insight and autonomous resolution.
is-itom.summary: ServiceNow ITOM modernizes IT operations by federating signals from systems and services to find unknown issues before they become incidents. It integrates natively with ITSM to deliver resilient digital operations across hybrid and cloud environments.

feature_cards.title: Dynamic Service Mapping
feature_cards.description: Auto-build dynamic service maps with the Common Services Data Model to provide business context across hybrid and cloud.

feature_cards.title: Event Intelligence
feature_cards.description: Correlate and de-duplicate alerts across monitoring tools using AIOps to reduce noise and prioritize actionable incidents.

feature_cards.title: Agentic Remediation
feature_cards.description: Reduce repeat incidents — identify root cause patterns and trigger orchestrated workflows automatically.

feature_cards.title: Change Impact Analysis
feature_cards.description: Schedule service changes with confidence by seeing downstream impact before you commit.

key_capabilities: Real-time service health and anomaly detection
Automated discovery of IT resource dependencies

is-sir.name: Security Incident Response
is-sir.tagline: Respond rapidly to evolving threats with Security Incident Response.
is-sir.summary: Security Incident Response enables organizations to manage threat exposure proactively, react faster with collaborative workflows, and maintain cyber resilience. It automates incident prioritization and remediation across security and IT teams while providing real-time visibility into security posture and SOC performance.

feature_cards.title: Workflow Management
feature_cards.description: Automate assignments and coordinate incident prioritization and remediation across IT and security teams.

feature_cards.title: Operations Dashboard
feature_cards.description: Monitor SOC performance and identify where teams and response workflows need to evolve.

feature_cards.title: Major Security Incident Management
feature_cards.description: Respond collaboratively to critical incidents like ransomware and data breaches with coordinated processes.

feature_cards.title: MITRE ATT&CK Integration
feature_cards.description: Stay ahead of attackers with advanced context through MITRE ATT&CK framework integration.

employee-center.name: Employee Center
employee-center.tagline: AI front door to getting work done — autonomous agents handling end-to-end processes.
employee-center.summary: Employee Center consolidates search, self-service, and AI agents into one portal where employees find answers and complete tasks without app-hopping. AI agents autonomously execute workflows while employees access omnichannel experiences across mobile, chat, portal, and voice.

feature_cards.title: Intelligent Search
feature_cards.description: Ask once and get answers made for you. AI-powered search completes work from question to completion.

feature_cards.title: AI Agents
feature_cards.description: Autonomous agents connect teams, systems, and data to run entire processes end-to-end per policy.

feature_cards.title: Self-Service Across Enterprise
feature_cards.description: Single place to search, chat, or act for HR, IT, and procurement needs. Employees get what they need fast.

feature_cards.title: Omnichannel Experience
feature_cards.description: Consistent AI-native experience across mobile, chat, portal, voice, or kiosk for all workers.

key_capabilities: Run processes end-to-end with AI agents
Conversational AI search at enterprise scale
Enterprise-grade platform for scale and trust

conversational-ai.name: AI Agents
conversational-ai.tagline: Put AI Agents to work for you across your entire business.
conversational-ai.summary: ServiceNow AI Agents act autonomously to solve problems and drive productivity across IT, customer service, HR, and every corner of your business. Built on a unified platform with data and workflows, they collaborate as teams to handle complex tasks beyond traditional automation.

stats.label: less time building forms and workflows

feature_cards.title: AI Agent Orchestrator
feature_cards.description: Coordinate teams of AI agents to achieve complex business goals — better results than single agents.

feature_cards.title: AI Agent Studio
feature_cards.description: Build and customize specialized AI agents using natural language with built-in guardrails.

feature_cards.title: AI Control Tower
feature_cards.description: Central intelligent hub connecting AI strategy, governance, and management across the enterprise.

feature_cards.title: AI Experience
feature_cards.description: Meet users where they are via text, voice, web, and multiple channels — integrated into workflows.

key_capabilities: Customer service routing and issue resolution

knowledge-management.name: Knowledge Management
knowledge-management.tagline: Increase self-service rates and boost agent productivity with AI-powered contextual knowledge.
knowledge-management.summary: Knowledge Management empowers customers and employees with consistent, proven resolutions while enabling agents to create or auto-generate articles. The platform identifies knowledge gaps, manages feedback, and tracks usage to drive continuous improvement across your organization.

feature_cards.title: GenAI Content Creation
feature_cards.description: Auto-generate knowledge articles from closed incidents to accelerate content development.

feature_cards.title: Knowledge Gap Intelligence
feature_cards.description: Use AI to identify and visualize gaps for targeted content assignment and continuous improvement.

feature_cards.title: Feedback-Driven Optimization
feature_cards.description: Act on customer feedback through closed-loop processes to enhance article quality and relevance.

feature_cards.title: KCS v6 Verification
feature_cards.description: Implement Knowledge-Centered Service best practices to capture know-how and improve satisfaction.

app-engine.name: App Engine
app-engine.tagline: Build and run apps that think, act, and operate at scale with agentic AI and built-in governance.
app-engine.summary: App Engine is ServiceNow's low-code platform enabling anyone to build intelligent, agentic apps fast using natural language and AI. It combines AI agents, data, and workflows on a single enterprise-grade platform designed for scale, trust, and efficiency.

stats.label: less time on forms and workflows

feature_cards.title: AI-Infused Apps
feature_cards.description: Build apps with built-in AI using natural language and Now Assist for App Engine to create intelligent workflows.

feature_cards.title: Unified Developer Studio
feature_cards.description: Develop, test, and deploy faster in ServiceNow Studio with AI guidance — less overhead, more innovation.

feature_cards.title: Intelligent Governance
feature_cards.description: Scale safely with automated reviews and compliance through App Engine Management Center.

feature_cards.title: Agentic Experience
feature_cards.description: Create apps that take independent action — resolve issues, suggest answers, automate work.

key_capabilities: Natural language app building with AI guidance
Agentic AI for intelligent workflow automation
Unified platform for apps, data, and AI
Low-code development for any skill level

now-assist.name: Now Assist
now-assist.tagline: Accelerate productivity with generative AI built right into the ServiceNow AI Platform.
now-assist.summary: Now Assist combines generative AI with powerful workflow automation to improve organizational productivity. It delivers better self-service, recommends actions, provides answers, and makes searches more effective across employees, customers, agents, and developers.

feature_cards.title: Conversational Exchanges
feature_cards.description: GenAI through chatbots and virtual agents for successful self-service workflows using LLMs.

feature_cards.title: Content Creation
feature_cards.description: Help HR, IT, and customer service agents draft emails, chat replies, and written content efficiently.

feature_cards.title: Code and Flow Generation
feature_cards.description: Generate flows and code from simple text prompts for rapid development and editing.

feature_cards.title: AI Search
feature_cards.description: LLM-powered search that delivers actionable, relevant AI-generated summaries in context.

key_capabilities: Summarization for cases, incidents, and chats
Integration with Microsoft Copilot and OpenAI

ai-control-tower.name: AI Control Tower
ai-control-tower.tagline: Manage and govern all AI models and assets across your enterprise with centralized control.
ai-control-tower.summary: AI Control Tower provides a unified hub for governing any AI deployment at scale. Connect AI strategy, governance, and management across the enterprise while automating workflows and managing risk in real time. Gain visibility into the AI ecosystem and prove ROI.

feature_cards.title: Align AI with Strategy
feature_cards.description: Prioritize AI initiatives against business and technology strategy to focus on maximum-value projects.

feature_cards.title: Streamline AI Operations
feature_cards.description: Boost efficiency in the AI lifecycle with automated workflows and optimized deployment.

feature_cards.title: Manage AI Risk
feature_cards.description: Enforce governance best practices with real-time insights to mitigate risks and maintain compliance.

feature_cards.title: Integrate Any AI
feature_cards.description: Works with any AI — internally built, third-party, or agent-driven — across workflows.

key_capabilities: Map AI assets to business services
Track AI value and prove ROI

workflow-data-fabric.name: Workflow Data Fabric
workflow-data-fabric.tagline: Put your data to work with AI-ready, instantly actionable data across any system.
workflow-data-fabric.summary: Workflow Data Fabric connects data across systems and adds business context via unified data catalog and policy-based governance. It enables AI agents to understand how your company works and take trusted action without complex integrations or data duplication.

feature_cards.title: Connect Your Data
feature_cards.description: Tap into any system in minutes without complex integrations or managing endless data copies.

feature_cards.title: Contextualize Your Data
feature_cards.description: Give data meaning to enable personalized experiences, faster resolutions, and context-aware AI agents.

feature_cards.title: Control Your Data
feature_cards.description: Keep data safe and compliant with built-in governance and lineage tracking for trusted decisions.

feature_cards.title: One Platform
feature_cards.description: Unite AI agents, data, and workflows on one enterprise-grade platform built for scale and trust.

key_capabilities: Zero-copy connectors for instant data access
Unified data catalog with business context
Real-time data integration from any source

raptordb.name: RaptorDB Pro
raptordb.tagline: Unify analytics and operations on the ServiceNow AI Platform for insights-driven workflows at scale.
raptordb.summary: RaptorDB Pro is an HTAP database that runs transactional and analytical queries on the same live dataset without data copies or pipeline delays. It embeds real-time analytics directly into workflows, eliminating replication complexity and keeping sensitive data secure.

feature_cards.title: Real-Time Analytics
feature_cards.description: Access fresh, contextual information directly where work happens — no separate data systems.

feature_cards.title: Enterprise-Scale Performance
feature_cards.description: Handle growing AI workloads and user volume while sustaining fast queries and throughput.

feature_cards.title: Direct BI Integration
feature_cards.description: Give BI tools direct SQL access to live data, eliminating ETL pipelines and data sprawl.

feature_cards.title: Built-In Security
feature_cards.description: Keep sensitive data governed and encrypted within the platform — with archiving at scale.

key_capabilities: Direct SQL access for BI tools

integration-hub.name: Integration Hub
integration-hub.tagline: Natively integrate ServiceNow with any external app, platform, or data.
integration-hub.summary: Integration Hub connects hundreds of modern enterprise apps instantly to ServiceNow using prebuilt spokes. Build custom integrations with a GenAI-powered spoke generator requiring no code. Accelerate workflow automation while reducing integration costs and complexity.

feature_cards.title: Out-of-the-Box Spokes
feature_cards.description: Integrate data and automate thousands of actions in critical business systems — no custom dev.

feature_cards.title: Spoke Generator
feature_cards.description: Build spokes rapidly with no-code tools powered by OpenAPI specs for custom integrations.

feature_cards.title: Packaged Solutions
feature_cards.description: Reduce IT ticket volume with pre-built automation for password reset, provisioning, and access.

feature_cards.title: Connections Dashboard
feature_cards.description: Simplify credential management and connect systems in minutes through one unified dashboard.

key_capabilities: Pre-built integrations for critical business apps
Drag-and-drop flow automation with no code
Built-in REST API triggers and webhooks
Remote tables for temporary external data

amex-cmdb.name: AMEX CMDB
amex-cmdb.tagline: Single, trusted system of record for all configuration item data — hosted in AMEX Info Sec, consumed enterprise-wide.
amex-cmdb.summary: The ServiceNow Configuration Management Database provides full visibility into infrastructure and services. At AMEX it is hosted within the Info Sec instance and federated to the Enterprise and Risk environments via Workflow Data Fabric, so every workflow operates on a consistent, curated view of the estate.

feature_cards.title: Service Graph Connectors
feature_cards.description: Integrate external data from key IT systems seamlessly for comprehensive visibility.

feature_cards.title: CMDB Workspace
feature_cards.description: Central hub to track activity, ensure accuracy, and derive insights from configuration data.

feature_cards.title: Data Acquisition
feature_cards.description: Populate and refresh context quickly from multiple sources with automated data curation.

feature_cards.title: Visualization & Reporting
feature_cards.description: View business context and technical relationships through a unified, comprehensive map.

key_capabilities: Enable trusted AI outcomes across AMEX instances
